name: citomni/infrastructure
description: Lean, cross-mode infrastructure for CitOmni apps: DB, logging, text/i18n, mail, cURL, brute-force protection, and optional contact routes.

suggest.ext-gd: Required for the optional /captcha route (image generation).
suggest.ext-iconv: Improves UTF-8 normalization in Mailer (fallbacks exist).
suggest.ext-mbstring: Alternative for UTF-8 normalization in Mailer (fallbacks exist).
suggest.citomni/http: HTTP runtime for provided routes, controllers, request handling, views, and security integration.
suggest.citomni/cli: CLI runtime for infrastructure-related commands, maintenance tasks, jobs, and developer tooling.
suggest.citomni/authenticate: User accounts, login, registration, password lifecycle, MFA, trusted devices, and member profile flows.
